creator: pat@patmaddox.com
text:
dns/libidn2 fails to build using poudriere on a CURRENT machine (7aeec281b8b) and recent ports tree (66a68b0dff)

---

/bin/sh ../libtool  --tag=CC    --mode=link cc   -Wno-cast-qual -Wno-conversion -Wno-float-equal -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-undef -Wno-unused-function -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-float-conversion -Wimplicit-fallthrough -Wno-pedantic -Wno-tautological-constant-out-of-range-compare -Wno-sign-conversion -Wno-type-limits -O2 -pipe  -DLIBICONV_PLUG -fstack-protector-strong -isystem /usr/local/include -fno-strict-aliasing  -no-undefined   -L/usr/local/lib -lunistring -R/usr/local/lib   -Wl,--undefined-version -fstack-protector-strong -o libunistring.la  libunistring_la-c-ctype.lo  libunistring_la-c-strcasecmp.lo  libunistring_la-c-strncasecmp.lo libunistring_la-free.lo     libunistring_la-localcharset.lo libunistring_la-striconveh.lo  libunistring_la-striconveha.lo           unictype/libunistring_la-categ_none.lo           uninorm/libunistring_la-decompose-internal.lo  uninorm/libunistring_la-decomposition-table.lo      libunistring_la-unistd.lo                       -L/usr/local/lib
libtool: link: rm -fr  .libs/libunistring.a .libs/libunistring.la
libtool: link: (cd .libs/libunistring.lax/libunistring.a && ar x "/wrkdirs/usr/ports/dns/libidn2/work/libidn2-2.3.7/unistring/.libs/libunistring.a")
